abilities.name: Sniff For Snacks
abilities.text:
Roll a d8, then consult the following chart to see what Schnoz finds:

- **1: Bleghf** — Schnoz finds something bad to eat, like a car battery or a rock. It takes d3 damage.
- **2-4: Tasty Treat** — Schnoz finds something good to eat. Select a friendly monster within 6" of Schnoz. They heal d8 HP.
- **5-7: Energy Drink** — Schnoz finds an energy drink, which they share with those around them (either willingly or by force, depending on how well behaved your Schnoz is). Choose a monster within 6" of Schnoz (or Schnoz themself) to give the energy drink to. That monster gains +1 Action Token. Gain +2 [[kw:energy|Energy]].
- **8: Confusing Snack** — Schnoz finds an extremely powerful mystery snack not made by any natural force within this world. Choose a friendly monster within 9" of Schnoz (or Schnoz themself). That monster gains +2 Action Tokens. At the end of this action, your turn is over. Immediately take a second turn. You must activate that monster.
